---
applyTo: "**/*.ts,**/*.html"
---

## Angular rules

- Use standalone components.
- Prefer signals and services for state management.
- Use reactive forms for business forms.
- Keep smart/container responsibilities separate from presentational responsibilities when complexity justifies it.
- API access belongs in dedicated services or gateway-style client wrappers.
- Do not call HTTP directly from components.
- Keep templates simple and readable.
- Move non-trivial logic out of templates.
- Use strongly typed inputs, outputs, and models.
- Keep route organization aligned with business capabilities.Oc
